zh.lifeSummary: 當Jollan de Neville於1187年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Joelin de Neville clerk in the Exchequer47歲，母親Amfelicia Rolleston11184歲。他與Maud Beauchamp結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1245年在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特被列為superior justice at westminster。他去世於1246年在英國越可爾皮可爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jollan de Neville于1187年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Joelin de Neville clerk in the Exchequer47岁，母亲Amfelicia Rolleston11184岁。他与Maud Beauchamp结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1245年在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特被列为superior justice at westminster。他去世于1246年在英国越可爾皮可爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Jollan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard.
English (Staffordshire and Somerset): variant of   Wollam  .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads, mainly in Trøndelag, named Vollan, from the definite plural form of Voll (‘meadow’). Compare Wollen .

variants.name: Wollam
meanings: English (Shropshire and Lancashire): variant of the Devon surname Woolland, perhaps a habitational name from Woolland in Dorset, named from Old English wynne ‘pasture, meadow’ + land ‘land’. Alternatively, but less likely, a topographic name from Middle English wough ‘bent, crooked’ + land(e), lond(e) ‘land’ (Old English wōh + land), perhaps denoting a person who lived at or near a bend in a stream or river, or for someone from any place so named, such as Wollensbrook in Great Amwell (Hertfordshire). This surname is rare in Britain.
Americanized form of German   Ulm  .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Jollan de Neville was born in 1187, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Joelin de Neville clerk in the Exchequer, was 47 and his mother, Amfelicia Rolleston, was 11184. He married Maud Beauchamp. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1245, at the age of 58, his occupation is listed as superior justice at westminster in Westminster, Middlesex, England. He died in 1246, in Pickhill, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jollan de Neville est né en 1187, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Joelin de Neville clerk in the Exchequer, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Amfelicia Rolleston, avait 11184 ans. Il a épousé Maud Beauchamp. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1245, à l’âge de 58 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est superior justice at westminster à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1246, à Pickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jollan de Neville 1187 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Joelin de Neville clerk in the Exchequer 47 und seine Mutter Amfelicia Rolleston 11184. Er hat Maud Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1245, als er 58 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als superior justice at westminster in Westminster, Middlesex, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1246 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Pickhill, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jollan de Neville è nato il nel 1187 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Joelin de Neville clerk in the Exchequer, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Amfelicia Rolleston, aveva 11184 anni. Lui sposato Maud Beauchamp. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1245, all'età di 58 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come superior justice at westminster nel Westminster, Middlesex, England. Morì nel 1246, nel Pickhill, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jollan de Nevilleが1187年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Joelin de Neville clerk in the Exchequerは47歳，母Amfelicia Rollestonは11184歳であった。Maud Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1245年，58歳の時，イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターでの職業はsuperior justice at westminsterと記録されている。彼は1246年にイギリスヨークシュアイアピックヒルで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jollan de Neville(이)가 1187년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joelin de Neville clerk in the Exchequer(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Amfelicia Rolleston(은)는 11184세였다. 그는 Maud Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1245년, 58세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 superior justice at westminster이었다. 그는 1246년 영국 요르크실르 피크힐에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jollan de Neville nasceu em 1187, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Joelin de Neville clerk in the Exchequer, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Amfelicia Rolleston, tinha 11184 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Beauchamp. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1245, com 58 anos, sua profissão aparece como superior justice at westminster em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jollan de Neville родился в 1187 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Joelin de Neville clerk in the Exchequer было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Amfelicia Rolleston, 11184. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Beauchamp. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1245 году, в возрасте 58 лет,  он работал по профессии superior justice at westminster в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. Он умер в 1246 г. в местности пиккхилл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

Se casó con Maud Beauchamp. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1245, a la edad de 58 años, su ocupación registrada era superior justice at westminster en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Murió en 1246, en Pickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
